requiredDependencies.name: Oculus
requiredDependencies.notes: README and source both assume Oculus is present for the compatibility layer to activate. Exact supported Oculus version range is not declared in metadata.

optionalDependencies.name: Atmospheric Shaders
optionalDependencies.notes: README says this is the only officially supported shader pack.

optionalDependencies.name: Distant Horizons
optionalDependencies.notes: Repository documentation describes support as experimental.

confirmedCompatible.name: Atmospheric Shaders
confirmedCompatible.notes: Explicitly documented in README as the only fully supported shader pack.

confirmedCompatible.name: Project Atmosphere
confirmedCompatible.notes: Explicitly documented in README as supported.

notes: Other shader packs are not officially supported. README says they behave as if OFSC were not installed.
Distant Horizons is present in source and docs, but should be treated as experimental rather than fully confirmed compatibility.
Official compatibility for Valkyrien Skies, Eureka, and other third-party mods is UNKNOWN in repository documentation.
